sources.title: Guidance for Industry: Action Level for Inorganic Arsenic in Apple Juice
notes: Official final FDA guidance establishing a 10 ppb action level for inorganic arsenic in apple juice.

sources.title: CPG Sec. 540.600 Fish, Shellfish, Crustaceans and other Aquatic Animals - Fresh, Frozen or Processed - Methyl Mercury
notes: Official final FDA compliance policy guide for methyl mercury in fish, shellfish, crustaceans, and other aquatic animals.
The guidance identifies methyl mercury expressed as mercury in excess of 1 ppm in the edible portion only.

sources.title: National Food Safety Standard - Maximum Levels of Contaminants in Foods (GB 2762-2025) official standard text
sources.organization: China National Center for Food Safety Risk Assessment
notes: Official GB 2762-2025 standard text verified from the CFSA standards platform.
